input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.2
            TITLE: if the charger housing is conductive it must be connected to the earth ground of the ac input.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.2: If the Charger housing is conductive it must be connected to the earth ground of the AC input.
EV.8.2.2 If the Charger housing is conductive it must be connected to the earth ground of the AC input.

final_answer: If the Charger housing is conductive it must be connected to the earth ground of the AC input.
